name: io.github.forgemeshlabs/affiliate-router-mcp
description: Route x402 payments, Pyrimid affiliate splits, and referral links. Vendor-neutral, adapter-based.

environmentVariables.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Dedicated low-balance Base wallet private key for x402 USDC micropayments. Do not use your primary wallet.

environmentVariables.name: PYRIMID_AFFILIATE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your Pyrimid affiliate wallet address for on-chain commission splits (optional).
